raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "There is a shortage of certified court reporters in the courts.",
    "Timely access to a verbatim record of court proceedings affects the fairness and integrity of the civil justice system for low-income litigants.",
    "AB 882 will allow courts to use electronic recording in civil proceedings for low-income litigants.",
    "The courts must demonstrate real due diligence in recruiting and retaining court reporters.",
    "Having a live, trained court reporter is critical for creating an accurate and immediate record in the courtroom.",
    "California is in the process of rebuilding its pipeline of qualified court reporters, but this process is happening slowly."
